methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series D → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.5x) to $174M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Drones & Autonomous (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 4 same-sector peers exist in Drones & Autonomous, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Oxa
private.rationale: Same sector (Drones & Autonomous), same stage (Series D)

data.narrative:
Zeitview is a Series D company in the Drones & Autonomous sector founded by Dan Burton. The company has raised $174M to date. The comparable universe consists of five private peers in the same sector—Joby Aviation, Nuro, Archer Aviation, Elroy Air, and Oxa—with no public benchmarks available.

The valuation analysis relies on stage-progression methodology, which is applicable given Zeitview's Series D position and capital trajectory. Using total raised of $174M as a proxy baseline and applying a 1.5x step-up multiplier typical for Series D-to-next-stage progression yields an implied valuation of $261M. A peer-median approach was not feasible; while four same-sector peers exist, insufficient data points meeting narrow filters (same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar valuation tier) prevented reliable triangulation at three or more comparable transactions.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $222M (low) to $300M (high), with a median point of $261M. This narrow one-method triangulation carries meaningful uncertainty. The primary limitation is the absence of sufficient stage-matched or tier-matched comparables to validate or adjust the stage-progression result. Further confidence would require either additional Series D or late-stage Drones & Autonomous transactions, or transaction-level data from the existing peer set. The $261M median should be treated as a point estimate pending access to more granular comparable information.
